sentences.english: The weather seemed fine when I left home, but then it started raining really heavily.
sentences.korean: 집을 나설 때 날씨가 괜찮아 보였는데 비가 아주 세게 내렸어요.

sentences.english: I guess I learnt the hard way that you need to have an umbrella if you live in London!
sentences.korean: 런던에 살면 우산이 필요하다는 걸 힘들게 배웠어요!

sentences.english: Learning something the hard way is a bit like learning from your mistakes.
sentences.korean: 'learn the hard way'는 실수로 배우는 것과 비슷해요.

sentences.english: It means something difficult or unpleasant happened to you, so you learn to do something differently.
sentences.korean: 어렵거나 불쾌한 일이 일어나서 다르게 하는 법을 배운다는 뜻이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Kick the Can Down the Road
